consumer_electronics.title: Canvas is down as ShinyHunters threatens to leak schools’ data

consumer_electronics.title: Mira Murati’s deposition pulled back the curtain on Sam Altman’s ouster
consumer_electronics.summary: The week leading up to Thanksgiving 2023 was the AI industry's biggest soap opera moment. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman was abruptly ousted from his role at the ChatGPT maker. consumer_electronics.title: Apple’s AirPods with cameras for AI are apparently close to production

consumer_electronics.title: SpaceX has a $55 billion plan to build AI chips in Texas
consumer_electronics.summary: Elon Musk's plans to get into the AI chip manufacturing business are going to be costly. As the New York Times and CNBC report, SpaceX is planning to invest at least $55 billion into its "Terafab" chip plant in Austin, Texas. consumer_electronics.title: Peak Design is taking up to 50 percent off some of our favorite camera bags
consumer_electronics.summary: To celebrate founder Peter Dering’s birthday, Peak Design is taking up to 50 percent off a host of bags and accessories through May 8. consumer_electronics.title: Valve is fighting Steam Controller scalpers with a new reservations system

consumer_electronics.title: A hacker ran me over with a robot lawn mower

channel_news.summary: Temu, best known for cheap knick-knacks shipped directly from China, is now trying to convince shoppers to toss frozen ribeyes into the same cart as $3 phone cases and $5 dresses.
